name: Sobieski Messer & Elledge
subject: a quick thought on your intake
body:
Hi there,

Saw Sobieski Messer & Elledge's contact form has no instant response — someone reaching out at 9pm waits until business hours, and a lot of them call the next firm instead.

I build a system that responds to every inquiry within 60 seconds, 24/7, qualifies them, and gets them scheduled — plus it automatically asks resolved clients for a Google review.

If it's worth a look, grab whatever 15-min slot works for you here: https://cal.com/cyshek — I'll walk you through exactly what it'd look like for Sobieski Messer & Elledge (no pressure, no hard sell).

— Cyrus

name: Haisma Heating & Cooling
subject: quick one about Comstock Park leads
body:
Hi there,

Saw Haisma Heating & Cooling's site — like most HVAC shops, a homeowner who fills out the form usually messages 3 contractors and books whoever answers first (~78% go with the first responder).

I set up a system that texts every new lead back within 60 seconds, 24/7 — answers their question and books them — then automatically asks happy customers for a Google review after the job.

If it's worth a look, grab whatever 15-min slot works for you here: https://cal.com/cyshek — I'll walk you through exactly what it'd look like for Haisma Heating & Cooling (no pressure, no hard sell).

— Cyrus
